prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为12250→14371→17563→18197→15902，整体呈后移趋势，2023年达到峰值后2024年继续后移，2025年明显回升约2300名，波动较大。2025年基准位次约15902名；本省物理类计划2021年98人、2022年112人、2023年103人、2024年104人、2025年108人；2026年计划110人，较2025年小幅扩招2人，扩幅约1.9%，对竞争压力略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第49名，较2025年第52名上升3位，排名稳步提升，学校层次对考生吸引力有所增强；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第94位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常记录中2023年有低关注度信号（考生因分数线波动被录取后满意度较高），整体声誉平稳；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，均为该校王牌学科，对应招生专业交通运输类、土木工程等具有较强行业认可度，对相关方向考生吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，西南交大在上述领域均有对应招生专业，热门专业热度对整体报考竞争有推升作用；辽宁省2026年物理类考生约14.36万人（按历史比例估算），与2025年基本持平；西南交通大学位于四川省成都市，属西南地区，对辽宁考生而言为跨省就读，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2025年明显回升、2026年软科排名上升、招生计划小幅扩招、热门工科专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准15902名基础上略有前移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约15999名，区间15499–16499名。

- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息类（微电子科学与工程、电子科学与技术）
- 人工智能。

- 通信工程

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 12250 → 14371 → 17563 → 18197 → 15902, showing an overall backward trend, peaking in 2023 and continuing backward in 2024, with a significant rebound of about 2300 places in 2025, indicating large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15902; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 98 in 2021, 112 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 108 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, a slight increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.9%, which slightly eases competition pressure but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 49th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 3 places from 52nd in 2025, with steadily improving rankings, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 94th overall, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms; historical admission anomaly records show a low attention signal in 2023 (candidates admitted due to score fluctuations had high satisfaction), overall reputation is stable; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, both are flagship disciplines of the university, with corresponding enrollment majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering having strong industry recognition, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, and Southwest Jiaotong University offers corresponding enrollment majors in these fields, with the popularity of hot majors boosting overall competition for admission; the number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is estimated at about 143,600 (based on historical proportions), roughly the same as in 2025; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, in the southwestern region, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Liaoning candidates, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, a significant rebound in 2025, an increase in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, a slight expansion of the enrollment plan, and sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies) based on the 2025 baseline of 15902, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 15999, and a range of 15499 to 16499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15499 to 16499, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Communication Engineering, Data Science, etc.) as the main choices; Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) can be attempted but require rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range; Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials) serve as safety options. Southwest Jiaotong University's Transportation Engineering is an A+ flagship discipline, and related majors have high employment recognition, making them worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1860 → 1994 → 2304 → 2603 → 2387, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it peaked at 2603, then rebounded to 2387 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of approximately 2300–2600 in recent 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2387. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 9, an increase of 1 from 2025, an expansion of 12.5%, which somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 49th, up 3 places from 52nd in 2025, showing steady improvement. Its 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average. Historical admission anomaly records show a low attention signal in 2023, overall reputation stable. Its top disciplines, Transportation Engineering (A+) and Civil Engineering (A), are engineering fields. The History Category majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Public Affairs Management, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, limiting the appeal of its strong disciplines to History Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended/differentiated wait-and-see; Ideological and Political Education, Public Affairs Management, and Foreign Languages and Literature have average or stable popularity. In 2026, Liaoning Province has approximately 56,400 History Category examinees (estimated by proportion), roughly the same as 2025. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, in the southwestern region, with neutral regional preference for Liaoning History Category examinees studying across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the slight expansion of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (8→9), roughly stable examinee numbers, the university's rising ranking but low correlation between its strong disciplines and History Category, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2387 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2596, with a range of 2207–2985.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Southwest Jiaotong University offers only 4 History Category majors, a small number. For rankings within the predicted range of 2207–2985, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Public Affairs Management as the main choice, with Tier 1 Law and Ideological and Political Education as reach options, and Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature as safety.
